previousAttempt.note: Attempt 1 blocked 20 cases: 13 admin-destructive + 4 seed-required (coupon/tier/OOS) + 1 MCP-tool-limit (cross-session) + 2 state-dependent (empty cart, guest merge variant). Attempt 3 runs after CSV was edited to add ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE guards and rewrite 3 tests to runnable form (CART-021 API-layer, CART-046 with {{OOS_SKU}} fixture, CART-074 ordering dependency, CART-082 with {{OOS_SKU}}+{{LOW_STOCK_SKU}}). Seed fixtures NOT yet provisioned so seed-dependent tests still BLOCKED on this run.

testCases.title: Save for Later - Move Item
testCases.notes: Clicked 'Save for later' on Kingston KC3000 SSD ($80.27). Item moved to 'SAVED FOR LATER' section (visible with 'MOVE TO CART' action). Active cart removed Kingston row. Subtotal decreased $2,862.27 -> $2,782.00 (diff = $80.27 Kingston price). Total $3,091.24 -> $3,004.55. Cart badge 12 -> 11. GraphQL mutation HTTP 200.

testCases.title: Save for Later - Move Back
testCases.notes: Clicked 'MOVE TO CART' on Kingston in Saved for later. Item returned to active cart. Cart badge 11 -> 12. Subtotal $2,782.00 -> $2,862.27 (+$80.27). SAVED FOR LATER section emptied and disappeared. GraphQL 200.

testCases.title: Apply Coupon - Valid Code
testCases.notes: BLOCKED (seed-pending): Requires {{VALID_COUPON_CODE}} env var. CSV flagged 'BLOCKED pending seed' in attempt 1; no seed provisioned for this run. Structural invariant partially verified: automatic promotion discount -$294.26 (10% off cart subtotal >$1000) IS applied and visible in order summary, confirming discount apply pipeline is functional. Manual coupon input field renders correctly.

testCases.title: Apply Coupon - Invalid Code
testCases.notes: Typed 'FAKECODE123INVALID' into coupon input, clicked Apply. Red-bordered input + error message: 'This code does not match any active coupons. Double-check that everything is correct and try again.' Subtotal unchanged $2,862.27. Total unchanged $3,091.24. Automatic discount still -$286.24 (promotion engine still active). No HTTP 4xx/5xx. 0 console errors. Apply button disabled after error.

testCases.title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign In
testCases.notes: Pre-signout cart: 8 line items, 13 total units, subtotal $2,942.54, total $3,177.94 (Kingston qty=2, hoodie qty=1, UNTUCKit qty=1, Bike#1 qty=5, Bike#2-4 qty=1, Siblings qty=1). Clicked account-menu.sign-out-button. Signed in as qa-agent-slot2. Navigated /cart: EXACT restore - badge=13, subtotal $2,942.54, total $3,177.94, Kingston qty=2, Bike#1 qty=5, all other items qty=1 preserved. No items dropped, no duplicates, no price drift. BL-CART-006 server-side persistence fully confirmed.

Merge mutation HTTP 200. Re-validated indirectly through CART-019 sign-out/sign-in workflow which depends on same merge path.

Place Order DISABLED. Cart subtotal shown inflated ($3,452,517.27) client-side before server constraint; checkout correctly blocked. Same minor UX note as attempt 1.

testCases.title: Cart With Zero-Quantity Item Cannot Proceed to Checkout
testCases.notes: Set Kingston KC3000 qty to 0 via direct spinbutton input + Tab commit. Item auto-removed from active cart. Cart badge 13 -> 11 (Kingston disappeared, was qty=2). Subtotal $2,942.54 -> $2,782.00 (-$160.54). No zero-qty line persisted. No page crash, no JS errors, no 4xx/5xx. Graceful auto-remove path confirmed.

testCases.notes: Partial variance from spec: slot2 account had 8 pre-existing line items (not empty) — empty-cart-specific path not directly tested. However merge/transfer behavior confirmed: guest Kingston transferred to authenticated cart without loss, subtotal math correct post-transfer. BL-CART-008 structural invariant (guest->auth transfer) demonstrated.

testCases.title: Checkout Recalculates Totals to Reflect Current Prices
testCases.notes: Structural BL-CHK-006 formula verified on cart order summary: $2,942.54 (subtotal) - $294.26 (discount) + $0.00 (shipping) + $529.66 (tax) = $3,177.94 (total). Math exact to the penny. No price discrepancy between line items and summary. Verified without proceeding to full checkout (B2B setup not configured on this account for address/payment gating). Attempt 1 parity.

regressionBugRetests.details: Retested by typing '-5' into Kingston spinbutton + Tab commit. RESULTS: (a) type=number HTML attribute still blocks letters at browser level (unchanged). (b) Negative value '-5': input field VISUALLY retains '-5' (cosmetic regression from attempt 1 which claimed auto-revert); server correctly REJECTED the change with 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' toast-level error in sidebar; Decrease button disabled indicating server qty=1; line total showed $80.27 (1 x $80.27) confirming server-side rejection. After page reload, input field STILL shows '-5' but server qty=1 (display/state mismatch). (c) Zero-quantity via direct input (CART-048): still correctly auto-removes item (no regression). VERDICT: functional invariant holds (no negative quantity committed to cart / no price/math corruption), but minor UI-state bug: input field should auto-revert to last-valid value when server rejects, not retain invalid '-5' text. Recommend follow-up UX ticket for stepper input state-sync on server error.

Retested: clicked Kingston Increase quantity button 5 times rapidly via browser_click (starting qty=1). Final committed qty=6 (1 + 5 = 6). Cart badge 12 -> 17 (+5 units exactly). Subtotal $2,862.27 -> $3,263.62 (+$401.35 = 5 x $80.27). All 5 clicks registered server-side — NO stepper debounce drops. All GraphQL changeCartItemQuantity mutations returned HTTP 200. Bug remains fixed.

Minor UI-state regression discovered during BUG-Cart-Quantity-Input-Accepts-Invalid-Values retest: cart qty input retains invalid '-5' value visually even though server rejects. Does not affect business logic (no negative qty committed), but should be filed as a minor UX ticket.
Minor UX concern carried over from attempt 1: CART-026/047 subtotal inflates client-side when over-stock qty entered before server validation; checkout gate correctly enforced.
